name: adk-bot
description: A Botpress Agent built with the ADK

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p node_modules/@botpress/runtime/node_modules/@botpress && ([ -d node_modules/@botpress/runtime/node_modules/@botpress/sdk ] || cp -r node_modules/@botpress/sdk node_modules/@botpress/runtime/node_modules/@botpress/sdk 2>/dev/null || true) && rm -rf node_modules/@botpress/sdk
